nasb.text: While they were still talking with him, the king’s eunuchs arrived and hastily brought Haman to the banquet which Esther had prepared.

esv.text: While they were yet talking with him, the king’s eunuchs arrived and hurried to bring Haman to the feast that Esther had prepared.

cnv.text: 他們還與哈曼說話的時候，王的太監來了，催哈曼快走，赴以斯帖預備的筵席。

ccb.text: 他们正在谈论的时候，王的太监来催哈曼赶快去赴以斯帖预备的宴席。
